growth_records.medium: TRM medium (basal) + 20 L-amino acids + elemental sulfur

up.method: electron acceptor; growth strongly stimulated by S0 vs no-sulfur control (Fig 2c,d); qualitative only
carbon/energy sources; leave-one-out identified 11 essential amino acids; glucose and pyruvate boost yield (Fig 2b); qualitative only

sec.units: not quantified in text (sulfide vs OD600 time course in Fig 2c)
sec.method: S0 reduced to sulfide via membrane-bound sulfur respiration complex (MBS); measured sulfide concentration over growth, n=3

yields.note: Experimental growth yields on varied carbon and sulfur sources reported only qualitatively (+/++/-) in Fig 2b and as bar plots (Fig 2d, n=2); no numeric Yxs in text. GEM (GEM-i3DAC) predicts MBS deletion drops max biomass yield to 33% of WT (simulation, not experimental).

growth_records.cite: Hao Leng et al. Identification of a deep-branching thermophilic clade sheds light on early bacterial evolution. Nature Communications (2023). DOI:10.1038/s41467-023-39960-x. [PMC10356935]
growth_records.snippet: The strain 3DAC grows only under strictly anaerobic conditions and performs as a piezophilic thermophile with: temperature range of 30-75 C (optimal 70 C), NaCl range of 1.0-4.5% (optimal 2.5%), pH range of 5.5-8.5 (optimal pH 7.0)... Durin
growth_records.notes: Cultured deep-branching anaerobic thermophilic bacterium with a manually curated genome-scale model (GEM-i3DAC). Optimal growth: 70 C, pH 7.0, 2.5% NaCl, 20 MPa. Specific growth rate (mu, h-1) and growth yields WERE measured (Methods: OD600 via HACH DR5000, mu by linear regression of exponential phase; growth in triplicate) but NO numeric mu, uptake, or secretion rate values appear in the article text - they are only in figures (Fig 2c sulfide vs OD600; Fig 2d yields) and Source Data. Elemental S0 (1% w/v) reduced to H2S is the key measured secretion (qualitative here). Carbon: requires >=11 essential amino acids; glucose and pyruvate serve as additional C sources only with 20aa present. No rate arithmetic possible - no explicit numbers in text. Full TRM recipe referenced to external methods (ref 37/80), not fully listed here.
